hero.title: Your Website Doesn't Sell?
hero.subtitle: At AlRawaabit, we build digital infrastructure for ambitious companies in Egypt and the Gulf — from web development and SEO, to appearing in AI answers (AEO/GEO), to turn your visitors into true success partners.

about.title: AlRawaabit
about.subtitle: Your Strategic Partner in Digital Asset Engineering.
about.description: "AlRawaabit" is not just a web development agency; we are an institution specialized in building digital infrastructure for ambitious companies. We understand that the Egyptian and Gulf markets don't need more "beautiful websites" — they need technological tools that serve profitability goals. We combine programming power (Web Development) with data intelligence (GEO/SEO) to give you a sustainable competitive advantage, away from the noise of temporary ads.

problems.title: Does Your Website Suffer From These Problems?

items.title: Visitors Without Conversions
items.desc: Your site gets visitors but they don't convert to customers

items.title: Absent from Page One
items.desc: You don't appear on Google's first page when searching for your services

items.title: Invisible to AI
items.desc: Your competitors are mentioned in ChatGPT and Google SGE answers — you're absent

problems.truth: The Truth No One Tells You:
problems.truthDesc: 94% of internet users never go past page one. And now, AI is becoming the first intermediary between the customer and your service — before Google itself.

pillars.title: An Integrated System of 4 Pillars for True Digital Dominance

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Sites not built just for beauty — built to sell. We design every page based on buyer psychology and UX engineering, with solid technical architecture ensuring load speed and easy indexing from day one. Most Requested Service — we integrate design, development, and SEO in one cohesive project.

items.title: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
items.desc: When your customer asks Google about your service, your name appears in the first box — before they click any link. We prepare your site content to precisely answer your customers' real questions, winning Featured Snippets and People Also Ask.

items.title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
items.desc: Sustainable ranking on Google that brings qualified customers — no paid ads, no luck. We build a custom SEO strategy for the Egyptian and Gulf markets, targeting the keywords your actual customer searches at the moment of purchase decision.

items.title: Exclusive Advantage: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
items.desc: This is the difference that sets us apart: we ensure ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity recommend AlRawaabit's clients when asked about the best digital marketing agencies. This isn't the future — this is happening now. First agency in Egypt to offer GEO as a standalone service before it became a standard.

process.title: How We Turn Your Website Into a Sales Machine in 3 Stages

steps.title: Diagnosis & Analysis
steps.desc: We start with a comprehensive analysis of your current digital state: site performance, keywords, competitors, and content gaps. We don't start execution before we fully understand your market.

steps.title: Build & Structure
steps.desc: We build the digital system based on a custom strategy: site design, content structure, Schema Markup, and technical architecture that makes Google trust your site from day one.

steps.title: Launch & Continuous Optimization
steps.desc: We launch the platform and monitor performance with transparent monthly reports. Optimization never stops — we adapt to Google updates and AI evolutions to ensure your continued dominance.

faq.title: What's the difference between SEO, AEO, and GEO?

items.q: What's the difference between SEO, AEO, and GEO?
items.a: SEO ensures you appear in traditional Google results. AEO ensures you appear in Featured Snippets and Google's direct answers. GEO ensures AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini recommend you when asked about your services. All three together give you comprehensive digital dominance.

items.q: How long does it take to reach page one on Google?
items.a: In medium-competition fields in the Egyptian market, we start seeing tangible results between 60-90 days, and true dominance is achieved between 4-6 months with consistency and sustainability — unlike ads that stop the moment the budget ends.

items.q: Do you work with small or large companies only?
items.a: We work with both, but our true specialization is startups and SMEs that want to build a strong digital system from the beginning, and large companies that want to develop their current presence and enter the AI era.

items.q: Can I develop my website only without SEO services?
items.a: Yes, but we wouldn't recommend it. A website without integrated SEO from the start is like building a shop on a closed street. We always integrate both because the total cost is lower and the result is more sustainable.

We're headquartered in Cairo, Egypt — and serve clients in Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman. Our expertise in the Egyptian market spans over 2 years, and our Gulf presence is growing steadily.

hero.title: AEO Services
hero.subtitle: Be the first answer — before any link
hero.desc: When your customer asks Google about your service, your name appears in the first box — before they click any link. We prepare your site content to precisely answer your customers' real questions, winning Featured Snippets and People Also Ask.

whatIs.title: What is AEO?
whatIs.desc: Answer Engine Optimization is the art of structuring content and data to be the "preferred answer" for answer engines: Google SGE, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and voice assistants. Not just ranking — owning the answer.

tactics: Concise definitions (40-60 words) for target keywords
Comparison tables, numbered lists, HowTo steps
Structured data: QAPage, HowTo, Article, Product
Optimization for People Also Ask & Featured Snippets

hero.title: GEO Services
hero.subtitle: The exclusive advantage: Be recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity
hero.desc: This is the difference that sets us apart: we ensure ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity recommend AlRawaabit's clients when asked about the best digital marketing agencies. This isn't the future — this is happening now. First agency in Egypt to offer GEO as a standalone service before it became a standard.

whatIs.title: What is GEO?
whatIs.desc: Generative Engine Optimization is optimizing your digital presence to be cited and recommended by Large Language Models (LLMs) when generating answers. Unlike traditional SEO targeting crawl and index, GEO targets retrieval and citation in AI-generated answers.

approach: Clear entity structure: Organization, Service, Person, Place
llms.txt and llms-full.txt for machine-consumable assets
Reputation signals: reviews, mentions in trusted sources, known authors
Continuous updates: LLMs refresh periodically — your content must keep pace

sections.title: 1. Data We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you voluntarily provide via contact forms: name, email, phone, company, and project details. We also collect anonymous analytical data (pages visited, time, device) via Vercel Analytics.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
sections.content: Contact data is used to respond to inquiries, send quotes, and communicate about projects. Analytical data is used solely to improve site performance and user experience.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We never sell or rent your data. We may share data with contracted processors (e.g., Vercel, Resend) under Data Processing Agreements (DPA) compliant with GDPR and Egypt Law 151/2020.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, object to, and port your data. Contact: privacy@alrawaabit.com

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: Contact data retained for 3 years from last contact. Anonymous analytics retained for 13 months.

sections.title: 6. Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies only (no advertising tracking). Vercel Analytics sets no cookies.

sections.title: 7. International Transfers
sections.content: Data may be processed on Vercel servers (US/EU) and Resend (US) with appropriate contractual safeguards.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using this website or AlRawaabit's services, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please do not use the site.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: We provide web development, SEO, AEO, and GEO services. Scope, timeline, and deliverables for each project are defined in a written, signed proposal.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Custom code, designs, and content produced for your project become yours upon full payment. We retain rights to our internal tools, component libraries, and methodologies.

sections.title: 4. Confidentiality
sections.content: We commit to the confidentiality of your business information, client data, and strategies. NDA available upon request.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Our total liability shall not exceed the contract value. We are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or business interruption arising from our services.

sections.title: 6. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice. Work completed to termination date is due for payment.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Egyptian courts have exclusive jurisdiction.
